items.claim_text: Claim: HeiTang table routing must preserve source lineage and use builtin parser for XLSX..
Evidence: Source lineage is preserved when document_understanding_records links each normalized output to the original xlsx file..
Claim: Knowledge verification should compare package claims against local source evidence without LLM or network calls..
Evidence: The verification trace should cite package chunks and the local verification source..
Claim: Methodology extraction must keep evidence windows and source trace for reusable workflow rules..
Evidence: The source_trace report must set source_trace_preserved true..
When evidence is missing, stop and request review.
Claim: HeiTang table routing must preserve source linea.
